g.title: timeline_streaming
g.text: walshadow steady-state streaming — one record's journey through hot path

g.title: cluster_p3
g.text: ③ fan-out (pump task, sync — ordering matters)

g.title: cluster_p4
g.text: ④ shadow apply (record cadence, ms — pump task)

g.title: cluster_pQ
g.text: ④' QueueingRecordSink hand-off (pump → worker, decouples ④ from ⑤)

g.title: cluster_p5
g.text: ⑤ decoder gate clears + xact buffer (worker task — gated on ④)

g.title: cluster_p6
g.text: ⑥ XLOG_XACT_COMMIT → reorder → decode → batcher → inserter (pipeline)

g.title: cluster_p7
g.text: ⑦ async durability (off hot path, segment / cursor cadence)

g.title: drain6
g.text: drain spill + memory in WAL order

g.title: legend
g.text: rows buffered across xacts; budget/deadline seals one complete INSERT per batch; N INSERTs in flight; ack on contiguous-done
